Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
import pandas as pd
df_fighters = pd.read_csv\('UFC-DataLab/data/external_data/raw_fighter_details.csv'\)
df_stats = pd.read_csv\('UFC-DataLab/data/stats/stats_raw.csv', sep=';'\)

fighter_names = set\(df_fighters['fighter_name'].str.strip\(\).str.title\(\)\)
all_bout_fighters = set\(df_stats['red_fighter_name'].str.strip\(\).str.title\(\)\) | set\(df_stats['blue_fighter_name'].str.strip\(\).str.title\(\)\)

missing = all_bout_fighters - fighter_names
print\(f'Fighters in bouts but NOT in fighter details CSV: {len\(missing\)}'\)
print\(f'Fighters in bouts that ARE in fighter details CSV: {len\(all_bout_fighters - missing\)}'\)
print\(f'Total unique fighters in bouts: {len\(all_bout_fighters\)}'\)
print\('Sample missing:', list\(missing\)[:5]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
import pandas as pd
from db.client import get_supabase_client

df_stats = pd.read_csv\('UFC-DataLab/data/stats/stats_raw.csv', sep=';'\)
client = get_supabase_client\(\)

resp = client.table\('fighters'\).select\('id,name'\).execute\(\)
fighter_id_map = {r['name'].title\(\): r['id'] for r in resp.data}

resp_events = client.table\('events'\).select\('id,name,date'\).execute\(\)
event_id_map = {\(r['name'], r['date']\): r['id'] for r in resp_events.data}

skipped_fighter, skipped_event, would_load = 0, 0, 0
for _, row in df_stats.iterrows\(\):
    fa = str\(row['red_fighter_name']\).strip\(\).title\(\)
    fb = str\(row['blue_fighter_name']\).strip\(\).title\(\)
    if not fighter_id_map.get\(fa\) or not fighter_id_map.get\(fb\):
        skipped_fighter += 1
        continue
    try:
        iso = pd.to_datetime\(str\(row['event_date']\).strip\(\), dayfirst=True\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\)
    except:
        iso = None
    key = \(str\(row['event_name']\).strip\(\), iso\)
    if not event_id_map.get\(key\):
        skipped_event += 1
    else:
        would_load += 1

print\(f'Would load: {would_load}'\)
print\(f'Skipped \(missing fighter\): {skipped_fighter}'\)
print\(f'Skipped \(missing event\): {skipped_event}'\)
" 2>&1)

import httpx
candidates = [
    \('MMA Fighting', 'https://www.mmafighting.com/rss/index.xml'\),
    \('MMA Fighting', 'https://www.mmafighting.com/rss'\),
    \('MMA Mania',    'https://www.mmamania.com/rss/current'\),
    \('Bloody Elbow', 'https://www.bloodyelbow.com/rss/current'\),
    \('MMA Junkie',   'https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/rss'\),
    \('MMA Junkie',   'https://www.usatoday.com/rss/sports/mma/'\),
    \('Sherdog',      'https://www.sherdog.com/rss/news.xml'\),
    \('Tapology',     'https://www.tapology.com/news.rss'\),
]
for name, url in candidates:
    try:
        r = httpx.get\(url, timeout=8, follow_redirects=True\)
        print\(f'  {r.status_code}  {name}  {url}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'  ERR  {name}  {url}  — {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python -c "
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
from db.client import get_supabase_client

EMMETT_EVENT_ID = '3b3cc4f2-ac9f-4cf5-a6a9-a0b5d42a52bd'
client = get_supabase_client\(\)

resp = client.table\('signal_logs'\).select\('source_type, raw_summary, sentiment_score, green_flags, red_flags'\).eq\('event_id', EMMETT_EVENT_ID\).execute\(\)
rows = resp.data or []
print\(f'{len\(rows\)} signal_log rows stored:'\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  source={r[\\"source_type\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  summary={r[\\"raw_summary\\"][:100]}'\)
    print\(f'  sentiment={r[\\"sentiment_score\\"]}  green={r[\\"green_flags\\"]}  red={r[\\"red_flags\\"]}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
